title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BITS Pilani - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BITS Pilani - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BITS Pilani. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
